description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a fenced, landscaped yard featuring lush green grass, several flowering trees, and a few large deciduous trees at the corners. The building itself is primarily white with large, arched windows and a flat roof, giving it a contemporary appearance. A prominent feature is the spacious rear patio area, which includes a pergola with solar panels, outdoor seating, and a swimming pool. The front entrance is marked by a pathway leading to double glass doors, flanked by flowering shrubs. The structure appears to be two stories tall, with the upper floor featuring a large, curved window section overlooking the backyard. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and strong connections between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, white two-story bungalow with large arched windows, a flat roof, and a landscaped yard featuring a patio, pool, and flowering trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, pathway, and symmetrical landscaping with flowering trees and a fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large arched windows, side garden, and partial view of the patio and pergola.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive patio with solar pergola, swimming pool, and large glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Back side view featuring the curved window section, pool, and open lawn area with minimal landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large arched and curved windows on multiple facades
